plist.dict:
Label com.exomem
ProgramArguments
__VENV_PYTHON__ -m exomem --transport streamable-http --host __BIND_HOST__ --port __PORT__
WorkingDirectory __WORKING_DIRECTORY__
__ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES__
RunAtLoad
KeepAlive
ThrottleInterval 10
StandardOutPath __LOG_DIR__/service.out.log StandardErrorPath __LOG_DIR__/service.err.log
ProcessType Background
